description: Registry capability providing stable indirection by binding symbolic keys to opaque addresses and underlying storage references.

REGISTER.summary: Register a new key → (address, target_cs, target_ref) binding
REGISTER.notes: Creates immutable binding. Key must be unique. Returns deterministic address.

RESOLVE.summary: Resolve a key or address to its storage target
RESOLVE.notes: Accepts either symbolic key or opaque address. Returns where data is actually stored.

EXISTS.summary: Check if a key or address is registered

DEREGISTER.summary: Mark a key or address as deregistered (append tombstone)
DEREGISTER.notes: Append-only deletion (tombstone record). Idempotent - repeated calls return SUCCESS.
